claim: For 1x4x128x128x64 causal FP32 attention on AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT gfx1201, the tiled online-softmax seed measured 7.888201x faster than the recomputing per-output baseline using HIP-event timing only.
expected_profiler_signals: lower memory traffic from not materializing full attention probabilities
curation_note: timing-only attention seed record: HIP-event timings and CPU-reference correctness passed, but rocprofiler/rocprof counters and library/framework attention baselines were not collected. Treat this as seed evidence only, not a claim against CK, MIOpen, MIGraphX, Triton, vLLM, or PyTorch attention.
